text:
to identify cases in which the beneficiary’s enrollment 
start and end dates are valid, but the enrollment type is “unknown”; the person is not classified as 
enrolled in either Medicaid or CHIP. Months where the value 0 indicates that the code for enrollment 
type is not missing, and 1 indicates that it is missing. If the variable that indicates that the enrollment 
type is missing is null, then the beneficiary was not enrolled at any time during the month.
